overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view navigating through a heavily fogged, ruined dystopian city at dusk. The footage shows flight through dense atmospheric haze and close proximity navigation between brutalist concrete buildings, rendered in a video game engine.

segments.scene_description: Flying through a dense fog bank with visibility reduced to near zero. Dark building silhouettes gradually emerge from the whiteout as the helicopter continues forward, creating a disorienting, claustrophobic atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The helicopter emerges from the dense fog into an urban canyon between damaged high-rise buildings. The aircraft navigates through the narrow space between a ruined skyscraper on the left and a crumbling office tower on the right, with a broken elevated highway visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows low-altitude flight through narrow urban canyons, with the helicopter passing very close to concrete building walls. The aircraft descends slightly, revealing street level below while navigating between the ruins of the dystopian cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit view as a helicopter flies from a clear dusk skyline into a suffocating, opaque fog. It begins by gliding over a ruined city, approaching a dense bank of haze that gradually swallows the brutalist concrete skyline. As the aircraft enters the thicker atmospheric layer, visibility steadily decreases until the world is reduced to a near-total whiteout. The scene then shifts into a disorienting, claustrophobic void where only the dark, looming silhouettes of buildings intermittently emerge from the mist before vanishing again.

The shot follows a continuous flight path that emerges from a dense atmospheric haze into the claustrophobic depths of a ruined urban canyon. It begins as the helicopter breaks through the thick fog, revealing a narrow corridor flanked by a ruined skyscraper and a crumbling office tower with a broken elevated highway looming in the distance. As the aircraft pushes deeper into the cityscape, the perspective shifts toward a low-altitude trajectory that brings the camera in close proximity to weathered concrete walls. The scene then descends further toward the ground, exposing the desolate street level below while weaving through the oppressive ruins of the dystopian city.
